title: Rose Gold Tinsel Christmas Wreath 28cm
description: This Rose Gold Tinsel Christmas Wreath features holographic tinsel built onto an internal plastic frame and complete with decorative bauble embellishments. The tinsel wreath can be placed over a door during the festive period, in conjunction with a wreath hanging hook.
